seedMass._note: 63.1-145.6 MT based on 1-2 Atlas Heavy Industries descent payloads; theoretical minimum from modelling is 12-41 MT over 20 years but ASI-backed redundant estimate used

seedPowerRequirementMW._note: Continuous power requirement for 100 MT/year replication rate

keyMilestone.description: Off-world production eclipses total Earth-launched mass
keyMilestone._note: Derived from exponential doubling model; exact crossover year sensitive to replication time and import cadence assumptions

note: Growth model: exponential doubling each replicationYears period. Earth import: linear accumulation. A single seed can eventually yield millions of times the industrial capacity of the United States with zero further Earth investment.
